commands.purpose: Table view of coaching profiles. --primary-sport=<slug> narrows to one sport; --verified narrows to profiles with verified_by_admin_at != null.
Verbose read: profile + Staff + certifications + active assignments + current ratings + availability.
Elevate a Staff row to Coach by creating a CoachingProfile. --dry-run validates without persisting. Refused when the Staff already has a profile.
Admin verifies a coaching profile. Sets verified_by_admin_at + fires CoachingProfileVerified. Coach can accept assignments after this.
Flip is_active=false. --cancel-assignments cascades to CancelActiveAssignmentsOnCoachingProfileDeactivated. Coach stays as Staff — only their coaching role is removed.
Table view of assignments. --assignable-type=Session narrows to session pivots. --active filters to open assignments (end_date > NOW() OR NULL).
Create an assignment. Validates coaching_profile is verified + active. --dry-run runs the AssignmentConflictDetector and reports without persisting.
Table view of certifications. --expiring-within-days=30 filters to certs whose expires_at is within N days.
Admin verifies a certification. Sets verified_by_admin_user_id + verified_at.
One-shot report of certifications expiring within a cadence window (90/30/7). --output=csv for compliance export.
Table view of skill ratings. --scale=stars_1_5 narrows to that scale.
Per-branch roster export: coach + primary sport + specializations + active assignments count + verified certification count. Runs GenerateCoachRosterReportJob synchronously.
